# 2 Girls on the Go

> Boutique travel agency owned by Heidie Haynes, offering custom international and domestic itineraries. More than 40 years of personal travel experience behind every trip. Tagline: "Travel is a Mindset."

## About

2 Girls on the Go is an independent travel agency based in Granbury, Texas, serving clients across the United States and worldwide. The agency specializes in personalized, custom-built trips for solo travelers, couples, and small groups. Heidie Haynes, the founder, designs each itinerary herself based on the client's pace, interests, and budget. The agency does not sell cookie-cutter packages.

Areas of focus:

- International tours: Sicily, Italy more broadly, North Macedonia, Berlin, London, Greece
- Domestic United States and Canada: Savannah Georgia, Nashville Tennessee, Napa Valley California, Gulf Shores Alabama, Calgary Alberta
- Travel styles: luxury getaways, adventure travel, cultural immersion, wellness retreats, group/family travel, corporate retreats

## Contact

- Based in: Granbury, Texas, USA

## Featured tours

- [Bella Sicilia](https://2girlsonthego.com/tours/sicily-summer): 7 days/6 nights in Sicily, private villa with pool, bilingual hostess, curated experiences in Palermo, Cefalu, Marsala/Erice, Scopello. From $1,750.
- [Macedonian Heritage](https://2girlsonthego.com/tours/macedonia-tour): 4–6 day immersive cultural tour across Matka Canyon, Vodno Mountain, Lake Ohrid, Mavrovo, and the Orthodox monasteries. From $550.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://2girlsonthego.com/): Hero, featured tours, experiences, testimonials
- [Experiences](https://2girlsonthego.com/experiences): Travel style categories
- [About](https://2girlsonthego.com/about): Founder story and values
- [Plan Your Trip](https://2girlsonthego.com/plan): Free travel-planning intake form
- [Contact](https://2girlsonthego.com/contact): Inquiry form, FAQ, discovery call booking

## What makes this agency different

- Every itinerary is personally built by Heidie, not generated from a template
- 40+ years of personal travel experience across 6 continents
- Direct relationships with local guides and accommodations
- Single point of contact from inquiry through return home
- Available in English, Spanish, and Italian (via local partners)
